baseline.serverJest: Push-Location server; npx jest --testPathPatterns=transactional-event-participation --runInBand; Pop-Location: 8 suites passed, 133 tests passed.

fixes: Added FLOW_SCOPED and FLOW-09 annotations to all 20 transactional-event-participation handler files.
Replaced local IFreedomConfigService clones with the canonical server/src/freedom/freedom-config.interface.ts IFreedomConfigService.
Updated FLOW-09 FREEDOM reads from local getConfig({ key }) to canonical get(configKey).
Renamed the compliance escalation local queue port from IComplianceQueueService to ComplianceQueuePort so it is not mistaken for a fabric clone.
Replaced the group booking transaction failure path's business-logic throw with a rejected promise that preserves rollback behavior while avoiding throw-new scan violations.
Updated FLOW-09 unit/e2e tests to mock canonical FREEDOM get(configKey) return records.

verification.serverTypecheck: Push-Location server; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json; Pop-Location: exit 0.
verification.serverJest: Push-Location server; npx jest --testPathPatterns=transactional-event-participation --runInBand; Pop-Location: 8 suites passed, 133 tests passed.
verification.scanCommand: FLOW-09 PowerShell portability scan for throw new, CLS imports, MicroserviceBase service gaps, FLOW_SCOPED annotations, unscoped FREEDOM reads, local fabric/config clones, and direct SDK imports.
